source_name: Gate Z4 auditable ranking baseline evaluation (real archived ZTF negatives + synthetic positives)
source_url: generated locally by Skills/evaluate_ranking_baseline.py from Logs/pipeline_runs/ztf_alert_archive_ingest/ checkpoints (nights 20220817, 20220819, 20210106, 20210111)
instrument: ZTF (real archived negatives) + this project's established injection generator (synthetic positives)
cadence: two real archived ZTF night-pairs (2-6 day gaps), not a continuous survey cadence
band_or_frequency: ZTF alert-archive bands (not restricted to a single filter)
data_product_type: handcrafted-feature logistic-regression ranking baseline evaluation report: recall@K, purity@K, calibration error, false-positive review burden, ablation vs. naive real-bogus-only baseline
license: n/a -- locally generated evaluation report, not third-party data. Underlying real ZTF observations were sourced from the UW ZTF public alert archive; see ztf_labeled_alerts_tier2_cnn_v1.json's license caveat for that upstream source.
label_source: 142 real archived negative tracklets (combinatorial cross-night artifacts, confirmed non-single-object per docs/evidence/live/2026-07-04-gate-z3-observatory-codes-real-findings.md) + 200 synthetic injected positive tracklets
preprocessing_version: Skills/evaluate_ranking_baseline.py --n-positive 200 --seed 42, regenerable via the documented command in that Skill's docstring
known_caveats: Real result: 0/200 false positives at threshold 0.5 (see false_positive_review_burden in the report itself); do not extrapolate this to a claim of zero false-discovery-rate on live production data -- the negative class here is only the two real archived night-pairs available at Gate Z4 closure time, not a full survey population.

This is real evidence closing Gate Z4 (2026-07-04); it is now also cited by the A5 frozen canonical eval suite's `false_link` case and by the A7 promotion report's derived false-discovery-report input (Skills/extract_promotion_evidence.py).
